mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.project_id, inner_q.project_title, inner_q.project_describe, inner_q.project_identifier, inner_q.status, inner_q.start_date, inner_q.finish_date, inner_q.created_at, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.project_identifier,
CASE WHEN p.finish_date IS NOT NULL AND p.finish_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '완료'
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.project_id ) THEN '진행 중'
ELSE '신규' END AS status,
p.start_date, p.finish_date, p.created_at FROM project p
p.project_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m3 WHERE m3.project_id = p.project_id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m2 JOIN users u2 ON m2.user_code = u2.user_code WHERE m2.project_id = p.project_id AND u2.company_id = #{companyId} ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM members m WHERE m.project_id = p.project_id AND m.user_code = #{userCode} )
ORDER BY p.project_id DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE RN > #{offset}
mapper.insert:
SELECT project_id_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO project( project_id, project_title, project_describe, project_identifier, status, start_date, finish_date, created_at ) VALUES( #{projectId}, #{projectTitle}, #{projectDescribe}, #{projectIdentifier}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{finishDate}, SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR )
mapper.select:
SELECT project_id, project_title, project_describe, project_identifier,
CASE WHEN finish_date IS NOT NULL AND finish_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '완료'
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = p.project_id ) THEN '진행 중'
ELSE '신규' END AS status,
start_date, finish_date, created_at FROM project p WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET project_title = #{projectTitle}, project_describe = #{projectDescribe}, project_identifier = #{projectIdentifier}, start_date = #{startDate}, finish_date = #{finishDate} WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
